title: What Does 1 FIT Really Mean? Automotive Reliability, PMHF, and the Test-Evidence Problem
description: What 1 FIT really means over a real automotive mission: mission ppm, expected fleet failures, PMHF, ASIL A–D targets, diagnostic coverage, and why ultra-low failure-rate claims require billions of device-hours of test evidence.

title: Stop Guessing Environmental Loads
description: Build a defensible duty cycle and quantify lifetime exposure using an interactive stress x phase matrix.

title: Reliability by Design: A Technical Guide to Component Derating
description: A physics-of-failure-based guide to component derating, covering thermal and electrical stress models, design margin, and why derating is critical for modern high-power systems including AI data centers.

title: Understanding Arrhenius for Reliability
description: A deep dive into thermal aging models and their application in reliability engineering.

title: Thermal Shock & Coffin-Manson in Microelectronics
description: Learn how thermal cycling affects solder joint fatigue using the Coffin-Manson model. Ideal for consumer electronics.

title: Highly Accelerated Life Testing (HALT)
description: Understanding Highly Accelerated Life Testing (HALT): Principles, History, and Applications
content:
### Case Study Highlights

- Failure rates increased 15% at elevated humidity.
- Common modes: electromigration, dielectric breakdown.
- Mitigation strategies include design rule adjustments and protective coatings.

[Download the full case study PDF](/downloads/microelectronics-case-study.pdf)

title: Bayesian Reliability Predictor (Software)
description: How to estimate software reliability early using Bayesian evidence fusion.

title: Hybrid Test Planning: Taguchi + Bayesian + Monte Carlo
description: A practical guide to combining Taguchi DOE with in-situ Bayesian updating and Monte Carlo reasoning to create adaptive, confidence-driven validation plans.
